onboarding.title: 👋 Get started with PISUM
onboarding.subtitle: 3 steps to your first radiology report

step1.title: Download & install PISUM
step1.desc: One .exe installer for Windows 10/11. Takes under a minute.

step2.title: Open PISUM and sign in
step2.desc: Launch the app after installation. Sign in with the same email and password you used here.

step3.title: Create your first report
step3.desc: Choose a template by modality — CT, MRI, X-Ray, or Ultrasound. Fill in your findings and export to PDF.

team.addInfo:

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.cancelingNotice: Your subscription is set to cancel at the end of the current billing period. You still have full access until then.

subscribe.title: Choose your plan
subscribe.desc: Select the plan that fits your practice and proceed to secure checkout.

profileModal.title: Edit Profile
profileModal.avatarHint: Click the photo to change it (max 2 MB)

cancelModal.title: Cancel Subscription
cancelModal.desc:
Your subscription will remain active until the end of the current billing period.
      After that, your account will revert to the Free plan.

deleteModal.title: Delete Account
deleteModal.desc: This action is permanent and irreversible. All your data, reports, and subscription will be deleted immediately.

value.heading: A tool that respects your workflow

card1.title: Local-first privacy
card1.desc: Patient reports stay on your machine. No clinical data ever leaves your computer — no cloud upload, full GDPR compliance.

card2.title: 112+ radiology templates
card2.desc: Structured reports for every modality — MRI, CT, echography, and more. In 23 languages, ready for immediate use.

card3.title: AI Dictation & Enhancer
card3.desc: Dictate reports hands-free and improve wording with AI — designed specifically for radiology terminology and phrasing.

card4.title: LAN Network Sync
card4.desc: Share the same worklist across all workstations in your clinic — no cloud, instant sync via your local network.

compare.title: Detailed comparison
compare.subtitle: See exactly what's included at each level — pick what fits your practice.

lansync.title: How LAN Network Sync works
lansync.subtitle: Share patient data across workstations on your local network — no cloud, no latency, no GDPR risk.

step1.title: 1. Set up a shared folder
step1.desc: Point PISUM to a shared network folder (NAS, SMB share, or mapped drive). All workstations on the same network access the same database.

step2.title: 2. One shared password
step2.desc: The database is AES-256 encrypted. Set one password on the first workstation — all other PCs enter the same password to connect.

step3.title: 3. Instant sync across PCs
step3.desc: Each workstation reads and writes directly to the shared database. Changes appear instantly across all connected computers.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.intro: Everything you need to know before subscribing.
faq.q1: Can I change my plan at any time?
faq.a1: Yes — upgrade or cancel your subscription at any time from your dashboard. Changes take effect immediately.
faq.a2: No. All plans are month-to-month with no lock-in. Annual billing saves 20% and includes a free first month during the launch period.
faq.q3: Is the Free plan truly free?
faq.a3: Yes — no credit card, no time limit. The Free plan lets you explore PISUM with 10 templates, 50 reports per month, and PDF export. Upgrade whenever you're ready.
faq.a4: AI Dictation converts your voice into structured radiology report text in real time. It runs via a secure API — audio is never stored. Your monthly quota resets on the 1st of each month.
faq.a5: All payments are processed by Lemon Squeezy, a PCI-compliant payment platform. PISUM never stores your banking details.
faq.q6: Where is my data stored? Is PISUM GDPR-compliant?
faq.a6: Your patient reports are stored locally on your machine — PISUM never uploads clinical data to the cloud. Account data (name, email, subscription status) is hosted on Supabase with EU servers. PISUM is fully GDPR-compliant.
faq.q7: Does PISUM require an internet connection?
faq.a7: Yes. PISUM requires an active internet connection for AI Dictation, AI Enhancer, and subscription management. Your patient reports and templates are stored locally on your machine, but AI features connect securely to our cloud API.
faq.q8: Is there a free trial for paid plans?
faq.a8: The Free plan is a permanent free tier — no time limit, no credit card. Starter, Pro, and Expert all include a 14-day free trial so you can experience the full feature set risk-free before being charged. All paid plans are backed by a 30-day money-back guarantee.
